'''bofataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yachty|yachty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yachty|yachty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bofataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofatithi|bofatithi]] || [[word:bofatiji|bofatiji]] || [[word:bofatishi|bofatishi]] || [[word:bofatiki|bofatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofatuthuthu|bofatuthuthu]] || [[word:bofatujuju|bofatujuju]] || [[word:bofatushushu|bofatushushu]] || [[word:bofatukuku|bofatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofatuthu|bofatuthu]] || [[word:bofatuju|bofatuju]] || [[word:bofatushu|bofatushu]] || [[word:bofatuku|bofatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofatufthuf|bofatufthuf]] || [[word:bofatufjuf|bofatufjuf]] || [[word:bofatufshuf|bofatufshuf]] || [[word:bofatufkuf|bofatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofatethe|bofatethe]] || [[word:bofateje|bofateje]] || [[word:bofateshe|bofateshe]] || [[word:bofateke|bofateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofatothotho|bofatothotho]] || [[word:bofatojojo|bofatojojo]] || [[word:bofatoshosho|bofatoshosho]] || [[word:bofatokoko|bofatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofatotho|bofatotho]] || [[word:bofatojo|bofatojo]] || [[word:bofatosho|bofatosho]] || [[word:bofatoko|bofatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofatofthof|bofatofthof]] || [[word:bofatofjof|bofatofjof]] || [[word:bofatofshof|bofatofshof]] || [[word:bofatofkof|bofatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfthÃŸf|bofatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfjÃŸf|bofatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfshÃŸf|bofatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfkÃŸf|bofatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bofatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bofatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bofatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bofatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfthÃŸf|bofatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfjÃŸf|bofatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfshÃŸf|bofatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfkÃŸf|bofatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfthÃŸf|bofatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfjÃŸf|bofatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfshÃŸf|bofatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofatÃŸfkÃŸf|bofatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofatÃḊthÃḊ|bofatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bofatÃḊjÃḊ|bofatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bofatÃḊshÃḊ|bofatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bofatÃḊkÃḊ|bofatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofatathatha|bofatathatha]] || [[word:bofatajaja|bofatajaja]] || [[word:bofatashasha|bofatashasha]] || [[word:bofatakaka|bofatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofatatha|bofatatha]] || [[word:bofataja|bofataja]] || [[word:bofatasha|bofatasha]] || [[word:bofataka|bofataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofatafthaf|bofatafthaf]] || [[word:bofatafjaf|bofatafjaf]] || [[word:bofatafshaf|bofatafshaf]] || [[word:bofatafkaf|bofatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bofatasha|bofatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofatshÃḋsha|bofatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofatrosha|bofatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofatmusha|bofatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofatyasha|bofatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofatnkshÃḋsha|gobofatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofatnkrosha|gobofatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofatnkmusha|gobofatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofatnkyasha|gobofatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bofafatasha|bofafatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofafatshÃḋsha|bofafatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofafatrosha|bofafatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofafatmusha|bofafatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofafatyasha|bofafatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofafatnkshÃḋsha|gobofafatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofafatnkrosha|gobofafatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofafatnkmusha|gobofafatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofafatnkyasha|gobofafatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:befÃḊtasha|befÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:befÃḊtshÃḋsha|befÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:befÃḊtrosha|befÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:befÃḊtmusha|befÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:befÃḊtyasha|befÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobefÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|gobefÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobefÃḊtnkrosha|gobefÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobefÃḊtnkmusha|gobefÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobefÃḊtnkyasha|gobefÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bofatasha|bofatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofatshÃḋsha|bofatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofatrosha|bofatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofatmusha|bofatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofatyasha|bofatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofatnkshÃḋsha|gobofatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofatnkrosha|gobofatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofatnkmusha|gobofatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofatnkyasha|gobofatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
